Automated Enforcement

10-Min Window

System ignores short breaks. 10 consecutive minutes of absence triggers alert.

Staff Alert

Facility Manager receives a system notification for targeted verification.

14-Day Ban

Confirmed subletting leads to immediate 14-day booking suspension on SmartPLAY.

Public Trust Restored

Eliminating the financial incentive for touts by making unauthorized subletting technically impossible.
